README!!: Five-finger v6 right hand config. fingertip link is the distal phalanx (_3 link); center_offset pushes the keypoint from joint origin to the actual fingertip along the link's principal axis. Verify center_offset placement with `python glove_based/geort/env/hand_debug.py --hand v6_right` (shows fingertip markers via HandViewerEnv).
name: v6_right

fingertip_link.name: index
fingertip_link._offset_note: magnitude 0.047, tilt 3.76 deg from local +Z toward +X (per index_3 inertial COM direction)

fingertip_link.name: middle
fingertip_link._offset_note: magnitude 0.047, tilt 0.77 deg from local +Z (essentially aligned)

fingertip_link.name: ring
fingertip_link._offset_note: magnitude 0.047, tilt 2.25 deg from local +Z toward -X

fingertip_link.name: pinky
fingertip_link._offset_note: magnitude 0.06, tilt 4.3 deg from local +Z toward -X (inertia long-axis eigvec; COM-derived 8 deg was over-tilted because asymmetric internal mass shifts COM more than the geometric long-axis)

fingertip_link.name: thumb
fingertip_link._offset_note: magnitude 0.06, tilt 2.06 deg from local +X toward +Y (COM-direction)
